clinics.name: Sunrise Medical Center

faqs.question: Do you accept walk-in patients?
faqs.answer: Yes, walk-in patients are welcome during working hours, but appointments are recommended.

faqs.question: Do you provide online consultation?
faqs.answer: Yes, telemedicine consultations are available for select services via video call.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept cash, credit/debit cards, and online bank transfers.

clinics.about: Sunrise Medical Center has been serving the Lahore community for over 15 years. We provide quality healthcare services across general medicine, pediatrics, dermatology, and cardiology, equipped with state-of-the-art labs and patient care facilities.

clinics.name: Green Leaf Dental & Oral Care

faqs.question: Do you provide pediatric dental care?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have specialized pediatric dentists for children.

faqs.question: Can I book an appointment online?
faqs.answer: Yes, appointments can be booked through our website or WhatsApp.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency services?
faqs.answer: Yes, emergency dental services are available during working hours.

clinics.about: Green Leaf Dental & Oral Care provides comprehensive dental services including orthodontics, endodontics, and cosmetic dentistry. Our clinic is equipped with modern dental technology and highly skilled professionals.

clinics.name: Wellness Eye Clinic

location.address: 78 Vision Road, Model Town, Lahore, Pakistan

faqs.question: Do you provide LASIK surgery?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide LASIK and other laser eye surgeries with prior consultation.

faqs.question: Are eye exams covered by insurance?
faqs.answer: Most insurance plans cover eye exams. Please check with our staff for your plan details.

faqs.question: Do you sell prescription glasses?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide prescription glasses and sunglasses at our in-house optical shop.

clinics.about: Wellness Eye Clinic offers full-spectrum eye care services including routine exams, surgery, and vision correction. Our mission is to maintain optimal eye health for all patients.
